summary: Complete testing of 3 critical bug fixes for TGME ServiceBook. All P0 and P1 bugs verified as fixed. Backend API validation working, frontend UI changes confirmed.

minor.issue: Pre-existing data issue - some tasks had invalid client_id='test' causing 500 error. Fixed by adding ObjectId.is_valid() checks

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 (P0): MyTasksPage.jsx line 78 correctly navigates to /workspace/servicebook/field-task/{id}
BUG FIX 1 (P0): ServiceBookLayout.jsx shows correct field menu items (My Tasks, My Expenses, Request Parts)
BUG FIX 1 (P0): ServiceBookDashboard.jsx redirects field staff to /my-tasks
BUG FIX 2 (P1): TaskWorkflowPage.jsx lines 92 and 290 use ticket_id and client_id in WhatsApp messages
BUG FIX 3 (P1): TasksPage.jsx line 205 has required Ticket ID field with asterisk
BUG FIX 3 (P1): workspace_routes.py line 622-624 validates ticket_id and returns 400 if missing/empty
updated_files: /app/backend/workspace_routes.py (added ObjectId.is_valid() checks for graceful error handling)
seed_data_creation: Created test tasks with ticket_id via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bug fixes verified. BUG FIX 1: Field engineer panel shows correct menu (My Tasks, My Expenses, Request Parts) and navigates to /field-task/{id}. BUG FIX 2: WhatsApp messages use ticket_id and client_id. BUG FIX 3: Ticket ID is mandatory in Create Task form and validated by backend.

BUG_FIX_1_P0.description: Field engineer panel shows correct menu and navigation
evidence: Sidebar shows: My Tasks, My Expenses, Request Parts (NOT admin items)
Task Detail Page shows Start Task button

BUG_FIX_2_P1.description: WhatsApp messages contain ticket_id and client_id (not client_name)
evidence: Code review: TaskWorkflowPage.jsx line 92 uses ticket_id and client_id
Code review: TaskWorkflowPage.jsx line 290 uses ticket_id and client_id
Task workflow page header shows Ticket: #{ticket_id}

BUG_FIX_3_P1.description: Ticket ID is mandatory during task creation
evidence: Create Task dialog shows 'Ticket ID *' as required field
Task list shows ticket_id next to job_id
Task workflow page header shows ticket_id
